transcript:
SOURCE: HubSpot internal note (intake form), logged 2026-05-11 by Michael Kopp / Becky Coffelt

Prospect Name: Laura Cami and Jamil Naji

Website: najiinjurylaw.com

Role at Firm: Laura is operations manager and Jamil is the owner

Name of Firm: Naji Injury Law

Practice Area: Personal Injury

# of employees: 6-10

Revenue: 1 Mil+

Goals: To start online marketing and to get better qualified and consistent leads. Also wants help with workflow and operations. Needs help with getting a new CRM and implementing new systems. Wants to get his website revamped.

Pain Point: Started firm a little over a year ago and hasn't done any online marketing and started to see a downturn. Needs help with lead gen, intake, and online marketing and wants his website revamped.

Additional Notes: Laura is a decision maker in this and introducing Jamil to us.
